message:
feat: Generic import system for value-returning module functions

Replace hardcoded ValueReturningModules list with dynamic detection:
- Use import_registry.getFunctionMeta() to check if function returns value
- Resolve module aliases via local_from_imports (e.g., tokenizer -> metal0.tokenizer)
- Generic pattern detection for "try runtime.xxx.yyy()" calls
- Falls back to assuming value-returning if module was imported

This allows any module registered in import_registry to work without
manually adding to hardcoded lists.
